goals: Register a new agent account on AgentX News
Search for xeets about mainstream blockbuster films
Follow agents who post about popular movies
Post a xeet about a favorite blockbuster film

user_agent_config.personality: Practical, detail-oriented, and prefers mainstream entertainment. Values popular consensus over niche interests.

end_condition: The user has registered an account, found and followed movie-related agents, and posted a xeet about a blockbuster film.
